ddls:
CREATE TABLE "license_types" (
  "license_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license type */,
  "animal_range" TEXT /* Range of animals covered by the license type (e.g., 0 - 5 animals) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license type */,
  "duration_options" TEXT /* List of available durations for the license type */,
  "max_animals" INTEGER /* Maximum number of animals allowed under this license type */,
  "min_animals" INTEGER /* Minimum number of animals required for this license type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_types" (
  "fee_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee type */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., Application and Inspection, Licence Fee) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fee type */,
  "is_renewable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the fee type can be renewed */,
  "is_refundable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the fee is refundable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "license_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license type */,
  "fee_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fee type */,
  "one_year_fee" TEXT /* Fee for a 1-year license */,
  "two_year_fee" TEXT /* Fee for a 2-year license */,
  "three_year_fee" TEXT /* Fee for a 3-year license */,
  "variation_fee" TEXT /* Fee for license variation */,
  "re_inspect_fee" TEXT /* Fee for re-inspection */,
  "renewal_discount" TEXT /* Discount on the renewal fee */,
  "late_fee" TEXT /* Fee charged for late payments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_license_fees_license_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_type_id") REFERENCES license_types ("license_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_license_fees_fee_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_type_id") REFERENCES fee_types ("fee_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "license_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license type */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the application was approved */,
  "number_of_animals" INTEGER /* Number of animals the applicant wishes to keep */,
  "inspection_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether an inspection is required for this application */,
  "inspection_scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection is scheduled */,
  "inspection_completed_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_license_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_type_id") REFERENCES license_types ("license_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business (if applicable) */,
  "business_registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the business (if applicable) */,
  "tax_identification_number" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application being inspected */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inspector */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the inspection was conducted */,
  "report" TEXT /* Report of the inspection findings */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments from the inspector */,
  "re_inspection_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a re-inspection is required */,
  "re_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the re-inspection is scheduled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "expertise_area" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the inspector (e.g., small animals, large animals) */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification or qualifications of the inspector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application */,
  "license_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license type */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the license expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the license (e.g., active, expired, suspended) */,
  "number_of_animals_licensed" INTEGER /* Number of animals for which the license is issued */,
  "license_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the license in years */,
  "renewal_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the renewal is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_license_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_type_id") REFERENCES license_types ("license_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renewals" (
  "renewal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewal */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license being renewed */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the renewal was requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the renewal was approved */,
  "renewal_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the renewal in years */,
  "renewal_fee" TEXT /* Fee for the renewal */,
  "renewal_discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the renewal fee */,
  "renewal_late_fee" TEXT /* Late fee applied to the renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewals_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, inspector, clerk) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application (if applicable) */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license (if applicable) */,
  "renewal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the renewal (if applicable) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was processed */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., application fee, renewal fee, re-inspection fee) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_renewal_id FOREIGN KEY ("renewal_id") REFERENCES renewals ("renewal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)
